summary: Replay Timeline Visualization for Simulation Comparison Engine - All 13 backend tests PASSED, all 16 frontend UI tests PASSED. The timeline panel appears only in replay mode (not live mode) after a comparison completes. Backend returns aggregated anomaly scores and incident events in time buckets.

backend.test_replay_timeline_returns_correct_jso: PASS - window, threshold, bucket_seconds, score_timeline, events fields present
backend.test_replay_timeline_score_timeline_stru: PASS - timestamp, max_combined, avg_combined, devices_above_threshold, total_devices

frontend.replay_mode_switch: PASS - UI switches to replay controls
frontend.replay_metadata_panel_appears: PASS - shows window, telemetry events, anomaly records, devices

critical_code_review_comments: Backend GET /api/operator/replay-timeline endpoint correctly validates date range (end after start, max 7 days)
Backend returns correct JSON structure: window, threshold, bucket_seconds, score_timeline, events
score_timeline has timestamp, max_combined, avg_combined, devices_above_threshold, total_devices - limited to 120 points
events array has timestamp, event_type, device_identifier, severity - limited to 500 events
Frontend ReplayTimelinePanel correctly loads timeline data only after replay comparison completes
Timeline panel does NOT appear in live mode (verified by testing)
Combined Risk Score chart renders with Area chart (max/avg) + ReferenceLine (threshold) + Bar (devices above)
Event Distribution bar renders with colored vertical markers
Events in Window shows summary badges with counts and device counts
All data-testid attributes properly applied for testing
seed_data_creation: None needed - used existing historical data from Feb 28 - Mar 5, 2026
context_for_next_testing_agent: Replay Timeline Visualization fully tested. Backend GET /api/operator/replay-timeline?start_time=&end_time=&threshold= returns time-series data. Response has: window{start_time, end_time, span_minutes}, threshold, bucket_seconds, score_timeline[], events[], total_score_points, total_events. Frontend ReplayTimelinePanel component renders after replay comparison completes (mode=replay). Uses Recharts ComposedChart with Area (max/avg score), Bar (devices above), ReferenceLine (threshold). Event badges show counts per event type with device counts. Timeline does NOT appear in live mode.
